title: Pi-Lippa
content:
{{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}}

|death=Between [[72 BBY/Legends|72 BBY]] and [[41 BBY/Legends|41 BBY]]<ref name="Date">{{FactFile|70|SHM 1-4|Shmi Skywalker}} establishes that [[Shmi Skywalker Lars/Legends|Shmi Skywalker]] was [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] as an [[Youngling/Legends|infant]] and was acquired by Pi-Lippa as property until Pi-Lippa's [[Death/Legends|death]], which took place prior to the [[Reproduction/Legends|birth]] of Skywalker's [[Gender/Legends|son]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]. According to {{FactFile|140|FAM 1-2|Skywalker Family Tree}}, Shmi was born in [[72 BBY/Legends|72 BBY]] and Anakin was born [[41 BBY/Legends|41 BBY]]. Therefore, Pi-Lippa must have died in between those [[Standard year/Legends|years]].</ref>

'''Pi-Lippa''' was an [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Slaver/Legends|enslaver]] who acquired the [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Shmi Skywalker Lars/Legends|Shmi Skywalker]] as property for a period of [[Time/Legends|time]]<ref name="Fact File">{{FactFile|70|SHM 1-4|Shmi Skywalker}}</ref> between [[72 BBY/Legends|72 BBY]] and [[41 BBY/Legends|41 BBY]].<ref name="Date" /> Pi-Lippa was a kind individual<ref name="Databank">{{DB|character|shmiskywalker|Skywalker, Shmi}}</ref> who went out of her way to teach Skywalker technical skills<ref name="Fact File" /> and promised to grant her freedom.<ref name="Databank" /> Unfortunately for Skywalker,<ref name="Fact File" /> Pi-Lippa [[Death/Legends|died]] unexpectedly before fulfilling her promise,<ref name="CSWE" /> devastating the Human.<ref name="Fact File" /> 

The inheritors of Pi-Lippa's estate chose not to honor her commitment to Skywalker's freedom,<ref name="Fact File" /> and the Human was sold to a [[Pi-Lippa's relative|relative]] of Pi-Lippa,<ref name="CSWE" /> who did not want to grant Skywalker's freedom.<ref name="Rise and Fall">''[[The Rise and Fall of Darth Vader]]''</ref> The skills that Pi-Lippa taught Skywalker increased her value to her later enslavers,<ref name="Power">{{HasbroCite|set=Star Wars: Power of the Jedi|pack=Shmi Skywalker|altlink=https://www.rebelscum.com/POTJshmi.asp}}</ref> and she continued to apply them in her [[Local day/Legends|daily]] life<ref name="CSWE" /> on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Visual">''[[Star Wars: Episode I: The Visual Dictionary]]''</ref> [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="CSWE" /> Skywalker was eventually freed after being purchased by the [[Moisture farmer/Legends|moisture farmer]] [[Cliegg Lars/Legends|Cliegg Lars]], who also [[Marriage/Legends|married]] her.<ref name="Databank" />

==Behind the scenes==
Pi-Lippa was first mentioned in the [[1999]] reference book [[Star Wars: Episode I: The Visual Dictionary|''Star Wars: Episode I The Visual Dictionary'']], written by [[David West Reynolds (real person)|David West Reynolds]].<ref name="Visual" />
